rules.rule: entries MUST be a non-empty ordered list of {entry_id, package_id, reason, governing_artifact_pointer}
every package_id MUST resolve; governing_artifact_pointer MUST be a {kind, id} dict referencing an existing artifact
ordering is reviewer-supplied only; NO automatic prioritization, NO probabilistic ranking, NO AI scoring; rank/score/priority keys forbidden
queue_sha256 deterministic over canonical JSON; reviewer attribution mandatory
